description: Complete Phases 2-5 of ADR-047 (Internal Documentation System). Phase 1 (canonical glossary) shipped 2026-05-04 in commit 15841351. Remaining work: system-architecture + component docs migrated from CLAUDE.md, WASM module READMEs (7 modules), hex docs check CLI, and ADR frontmatter migration.

phases.description: Migrate the system-architecture overview from CLAUDE.md and the README into a canonical docs/reference/system-architecture.md plus per-component docs/reference/components/<unit>.md files. CLAUDE.md remains the model-facing kernel; reference docs become the long-form source of truth.
phases.name: Phase 2 — system-architecture + component docs

tasks.description: Create docs/reference/system-architecture.md. Source content: existing CLAUDE.md 'System Components' table + README architecture sections. Cover all 5 deployment units (SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, hex-agent, hex-dashboard, hex clients), their dependency graph, data flow on cold start, data flow on a typical workplan execution, and the standalone-mode variant (ADR-2604112000). Use mermaid diagrams for the dependency graph. Cite ADR-025, ADR-027, ADR-044, ADR-2604112000.
tasks.name: Author docs/reference/system-architecture.md

tasks.description: Create five component docs in docs/reference/components/: spacetimedb.md, hex-nexus.md, hex-agent.md, hex-dashboard.md, hex-clients.md. Each follows the AI-agent-optimized format from ADR-047 (One-Line Summary, Key Facts, API Surface, Configuration, Depends On, Depended On By). Pull authoritative content from the matching CLAUDE.md sections + crate top-level docs + dashboard route table.
tasks.name: Author 5 component reference docs

phases.description: Author per-WASM-module READMEs documenting tables, reducers, subscription queries, and example usage. One file per module dir. Source content: each module's lib.rs (table macros + reducer signatures) plus client subscription examples in hex-nexus/src/coordination/.

gate.command: for m in agent-registry chat-relay hexflo-coordination inference-gateway neural-lab rl-engine secret-grant; do test -f spacetime-modules/$m/README.md || exit 1; done

phases.name: Phase 3 — WASM module READMEs

tasks.description: Generate spacetime-modules/<module>/README.md for each of the 7 modules: agent-registry, chat-relay, hexflo-coordination, inference-gateway, neural-lab, rl-engine, secret-grant. Each README must list all tables (schema, indexes), all reducers (parameters, side effects, error cases), recommended subscription queries, and a minimal client usage example. Use the lib.rs of each module as ground truth.
tasks.name: Author 7 WASM module READMEs

phases.description: Implement the hex docs check CLI command. Scans docs/reference/ for code-symbol references, verifies they still resolve, and flags terminology drift against the glossary. Reports docs untouched in 90+ days. Wire as a subcommand in hex-cli/src/commands/.
phases.name: Phase 4 — hex docs check CLI

tasks.description: Create hex-cli/src/commands/docs.rs with subcommands: `hex docs check` (scans docs/reference/, verifies referenced symbols exist via tree-sitter or ripgrep, checks glossary compliance, reports stale docs >90d). Wire into the top-level Cli enum in hex-cli/src/main.rs. Output: ANSI-coloured human report by default, --json for tooling. Exit code non-zero on any failure so CI can gate.
tasks.name: Implement hex docs check command

tasks.description: Add a pre-commit hook helper: when files in spacetime-modules/<m>/ change, warn if the matching spacetime-modules/<m>/README.md is unchanged in the same commit. Wire via the existing hex hook system (hex-cli/src/commands/hook/mod.rs — note: the workplan's original `hook.rs` path predates the 2026 refactor that turned hook into a module dir). Reconciler 2026-05-04 false-positive flipped this to done because the path-existence check matched the directory; ground-truth grep finds no implementation. Re-opening as pending.
tasks.name: Pre-commit warning for stale module READMEs

phases.description: Migrate all ADRs to the YAML frontmatter spec defined in ADR-047 §Tier 2. Add the hex adr graph subcommand that reads frontmatter and emits a dependency graph (mermaid + JSON).
phases.name: Phase 5 — ADR frontmatter + dependency graph

tasks.description: Migrate all ADRs in docs/adrs/ to include the YAML frontmatter block (id, status, date, supersedes, superseded_by, depends_on, components, modules) defined in ADR-047 §Tier 2. Backfill components/modules by parsing existing 'Dependencies' and prose sections. Validate every ADR parses with serde_yaml.
tasks.name: Backfill YAML frontmatter on all ADRs

tasks.description: Add `hex adr graph` subcommand under hex-cli/src/commands/adr.rs. Reads frontmatter from every ADR, builds depends_on / supersedes graph, emits mermaid (default) or JSON (--json). Extend `hex adr abandoned` to walk depends_on chains for cascading staleness.
tasks.name: Implement hex adr graph + cascading staleness

tasks.description: Update ADR-047 implementation evidence block: mark all 5 phases done, cite the commits that shipped them, drop the 2026-05-04 'Phase 1 shipped' provisional language.
tasks.name: Close out ADR-047 evidence block
